# Smart Bio Notes — NEET Biology & Science Study Platform

> Smart Bio Notes is an interactive, AI-optimized active-recall study system built for NEET 2027 aspirants. It covers the full NCERT Class 11 and Class 12 Biology, Physics, and Chemistry syllabus with adaptive flashcards, spaced-repetition quizzes, smart mnemonics, and pre-rendered study notes.

## Primary Resources & Navigation

- [Homepage](https://smartbionotes.in/): Main interactive platform and chapter dashboard.
- [Study Notes & Syllabus](https://smartbionotes.in/#chap-grid): Complete NCERT chapter notes with flow diagrams, comparison tables, and formulas.
- [Interactive Guide](https://smartbionotes.in/guide/): Detailed walkthrough on active recall, spaced repetition, and how to study effectively for NEET.
- [Sitemap](https://smartbionotes.in/sitemap.xml): Full XML index of all pre-rendered pSEO pages, notes, flashcards, and MCQs.

## Legal & Compliance

- [Terms of Service](https://smartbionotes.in/terms/): Usage terms and subscription policies.
- [Privacy Policy](https://smartbionotes.in/privacy/): Data handling and user privacy guidelines.

## Technical & Crawler Guidance

- **Content Structure**: Contains 35+ NCERT chapters, 1,700+ interactive flashcards, 1,600+ MCQs, and 170+ mnemonics.
- **Rendering**: Static pre-rendered pages exist for all chapters (`/notes/*`, `/mcq/*`, `/flashcards/*`), while the core app hydrates dynamically for authenticated users.
